text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the turn of the new year, Mejiro Bright
enters her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, your tutelage proved invaluable over the
course of last year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to further guidance from you this
year. It's my honor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not sure whether I responded in the proper
manner, but our conversation is still going, so
let's call it good.
choice_data_list:
By the way, Bright, do you have any New Year's
resolutions?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ah, resolutions! Well, I do have one in mind, of
course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's to perform well at the Classic Triple Crown
and bring further glory to the Mejiro name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright is typically one to take things slow,
but she shows zero hesitation with her answer. She
can see her goal as clear as day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I mean to try especially hard at the Satsuki Sho
and the Japanese Derby, as neither of those has
yet been won by a Mejiro.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, she's right. No member
of the Mejiro family has claimed victory at either
the Satsuki Sho or the Japanese Derby yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If her sights are set on those races... she might
already have scoped out the potential
competition, too.
choice_data_list:
You can't let your rivals beat you at the Satsuki
Sho!

You can't let your rivals beat you at the Satsuki
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oooh... My "rivals"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, Trainer, but who might you be
referring to?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ah... It seems she doesn't have her competition
marked yet. Well, when it comes to Mejiro
Bright's peers, there's...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So... You're aiming for the Satsuki Sho, are you,
Bright?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I haven't nailed down my running style yet.
Hopefully, I'll have a clearer picture of it in time
for the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka. She's a quiet Umamusume who
keeps to herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her indecisiveness influences her running and is
limiting her success. Expectations for her classic
year admittedly aren't the highest.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I see it! I see all, Bright! You intend to run
run run in the Classic races, yes?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I expect a mighty rival will make an appearance!
Well, I'm referring to myself there, of course.
That's assuming I can fill those cleats, anyway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru—she's into fortune-telling
and the supernatural.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks like she's doing her best, but rumors
abound that she's relying a little too much on luck
at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka, Fukukitaru... We've spoken from time to
time, but I've only just realized now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We joined the Twinkle Series at the same time,
didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Mejiro Bright, who tends to march
to the beat of her own drum, only saw those two
as conversation partners. As for her rivals
themselves, though, surprising no one...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I hadn't paid it any mind either. I've been
focused entirely on refining my running.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Likewise! I've been devoting all my efforts to
increasing my luck parameters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
None of them have pegged the others as
threats... They're all so busy finding themselves
that they don't have the headspace to even
consider rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, Trainer. Given that it's the start of a
brand-new year, and there are actually two
individuals I'd like to get to know better...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think I should choose to spend time
with? There's always the option of spending the
time alone, of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How to spend New Year's with her peers... What
should I suggest?
choice_data_list: Invite Fukukitaru to play with dolls.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that does sound fun. Dear Suzuka, I wonder if
you wouldn't mind letting me braid your gorgeous
hair?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I've loved braiding since I was a child, you see...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Braid it? I mean, I wouldn't mind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Then let's begin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: La la laaa, la la laaa. ♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... Bright? You've been at this for a while. Are
you almost finished?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, not at all. I'm still brushing your hair. I've yet
to begin the braiding. ♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...So this is going to take quite a while longer,
then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright makes sure that every strand of
Silence Suzuka's hair is perfectly in place, and
even while having fun, she grows more patient
through the process as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Admire bonsai alone... Yes, that might be nice. I
can frolic with my school friends anytime I like,
after all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I must bid the two of you farewell for the time
being. I'm off to observe the bonsai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tonk... Tonk...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Ahh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright is simply admiring the bonsai trees
when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer? I've come to a realization...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It is said that each bonsai tree is akin to a
miniature universe, but upon observing them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I would posit that they are not universes, but
trees after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Words fail me. Still, this venture has definitely
been a soothing one for Mejiro Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Play with dolls... Ah, yes, Fukukitaru, what are
your thoughts on this little one?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Her name is Maki, and she's ever such a good girl.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! For you to have a doll like this in your possession, Bright, you must be truly devout.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That is your charm—your protection, no? A doll
that sustains injuries in your stead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Pardon me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, katashiro dolls have been used in Misogi
purification ceremonies for millennia...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And this doll has absorbed any and all calamities
that would have befallen you, Bright. How
fortunate...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, dear me. Poor Maki...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright heads to the shrine to hear some
Shinto teachings and comes away having learned
a thing or two.
